input: learner-exercise interaction logs (with multi-behavior responses) and a knowledge graph
output: ranked list of exercises for each learner
backbone: GRU with behavior focus-temporal decay dual attention + conjugate deep cross-network + incremental progressive relational aggregation GCN
loss: multi-task balanced recommendation loss (not explicitly named)
key_idea: model multi-behavior interactions and semantic-enhanced knowledge graph with time-sensitive knowledge tracing and dual-dimensional ability assessment
